text_block_list.text:
Today's the Spring Fan Fest, an event in which
Umamusume compete in various trials to
entertain their fans.

That's nothing out of the ordinary, so I calmly
leave to check out Seiun Sky's usual hangout
spots, when...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yawn...
choice_data_list: (There she is! But who's that with her?)

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Look what we have here... Sky, this is
unacceptable behavior.

King Halo is here as well. I can't help but find it
strange that a well-behaved student like her
would be on the roof.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Chill out, no one can see me. Besides, aren't you
competing, King?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Isn't it way more unacceptable for a proper lady
like you to be playing hooky?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I am not playing hooky! ...I'm simply taking a
break.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You say that, but you totally ran away, right? I don't blame ya. Getting swarmed by reporters asking, "Why this insane decision?" doesn't sound fun.

King Halo has been running in mile and sprint
races lately, and I know the press is eager to find
out what caused her sudden shift in course.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Sooo, why the change of heart? How about an
exclusive for the Sky Tribune?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Uh... What's with the angry glaring?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Did you already tell me? Or did I say someth—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: No! It has nothing to do with you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I simply reconsidered my path... the path I must follow.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm not fleeing the press. I feel neither regret nor
any sense of inferiority concerning my decision.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: It's only that... at the moment I'm a little...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: A little?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...It's nothing. I'm leaving.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Stay right where you are and watch as I handle
the press in my first-rate manner!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, sorry—I tease too much. You don't have to
rush off.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Twenty minutes.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I have to show up anyway, so I'll go be
everybody's idol for about twenty minutes.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Just keep your eyes on me. You're gonna be
biting on your hankie when you see the way I
work the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and when you've had enough, just tell 'em
you've had enough.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: That's what I always do.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Wait a moment—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...How absurd. I'm not going to handle things the
way you do.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey, Trainer. Doing a little eavesdropping, I
see. Tsk-tsk.
choice_data_list: You two get along pretty well.
You two get along pretty well.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nah, it's not like that. There's not much other
people can help you with.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
In the end, the only person you can rely on... is
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Anyway! I gotta go work the crowd!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yep. Speaking of, I've got a favor to ask.

Seiun Sky asks me to gather as many fans and
reporters as I possibly can. And then...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky! Do you have a strategy prepared for
the next spring Tenno Sho?!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Tell us your strategy as an exclusive! We'll trade
you info on some hidden fishing spots for it!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: You're so cute, Sei! ♪ Take a picture with us girls!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Hey, I was here first! Sei, let me adopt you!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whoa, this is chaos!
choice_data_list: Did I bring too many people?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nope, this is exactly what I ordered. I just have to try and manage them all.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky! You're adorable! Can I pat you on the
head?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'm not sure I'm cut out for this. Nya-ha-ha...

Sky somehow manages to speak with every last
fan and reporter... but ends up pretty exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: You're so cute, Sei! ♪ Take a picture with us girls!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Nice one, Trainer. ♪ I knew you'd do a
great job rounding everyone up!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You'll just have to wait and see.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Uh, reporter in the back? You asked about my
strategy for the spring Tenno Sho, right?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Yes! Are you seriously going to tell us?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, well... I guess that depends on what I get in
return.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Y-you want compensation?! But I don't have—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, fans! It's time to go take a nap in the
courtyard!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Woooo!
Can't wait to see your face when you sleep! ♪

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: O-okay! Okay! I can trade info with you!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yeah?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: It's about this year's spring Tenno Sho... According to a certain source, Special Week is... mumble, mumble.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I see... That's some juicy info. ♪

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Now then, about your strategy...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Sei, let's get going already! You can rest your
head on my lap!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ah, sorry about this, but I gotta get going!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
This is the Fan Fest after all. That means my fans
come first.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Huh?! But I gave you that info!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey, I didn't promise anything. I said it'd depend on what I got, remember?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'll give you an exclusive interview after the race,
so we'll make it even then. ☆

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
B-but that's... Well, the spring Tenno Sho is huge,
so if you're offering an interview afterward... that
could work.

After reaching this miraculous compromise, Seiun
Sky manages to bag some nap time by dressing it
up as a fan event.
